Package de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext

Class MethodBodyStatement

java.lang.Object
recoder.java.JavaSourceElement
recoder.java.JavaProgramElement
recoder.java.JavaNonTerminalProgramElement
recoder.java.statement.JavaStatement
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext.MethodBodyStatement
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Cloneable, ExpressionContainer, NamedProgramElement, NonTerminalProgramElement, ProgramElement, ReferenceSuffix, TypeReferenceContainer, SourceElement, Statement, ModelElement, NamedModelElement
public class MethodBodyStatement extends JavaStatement implements TypeReferenceContainer, ExpressionContainer, NamedProgramElement, ReferenceSuffix
A shortcut-statement for a method body.

  • Constructor Details

    • MethodBodyStatement

      public MethodBodyStatement(TypeReference bodySource, Expression resultVar, MethodReference methRef)
      Construct a method body shortcut
      Parameters:
      bodySource - exact class where the body is declared
      resultVar - the Expression naming the variable to which the result of the mthod is assigned
      methRef - MethodReference that represents the call

      Return the expression at the specified index in this node's "virtual" expression array.

      Parameters:
      index - an index for a expression.
      Returns:
      the expression with the given index.
      Throws:
      ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException - if index is out of bounds.

    • replaceChild

      public boolean replaceChild(ProgramElement p, ProgramElement q)
      Replace a single child in the current node. The child to replace is matched by identity and hence must be known exactly. The replacement element can be null - in that case, the child is effectively removed. The parent role of the new child is validated, while the parent link of the replaced child is left untouched.
      Specified by:
      replaceChild in interface NonTerminalProgramElement
      Parameters:
      p - the old child.
      q - the new child.
      Returns:
      true if a replacement has occured, false otherwise.
      Throws:
      ClassCastException - if the new child cannot take over the role of the old one.

    • makeParentRoleValid

      public void makeParentRoleValid()
      Ensures that each child has "this" as syntactical parent.
      Specified by:
      makeParentRoleValid in interface NonTerminalProgramElement
      Overrides:
      makeParentRoleValid in class JavaNonTerminalProgramElement

    • getChildPositionCode

      public int getChildPositionCode(ProgramElement child)
      Description copied from interface: NonTerminalProgramElement
      Returns the positional code of the given child, or -1 if there is no such child. The result contains an encoding of the relative position of the child as well as the role it has been playing in this parent element. This information is required internally for proper undo of transformations and is to be delivered to the detached method of the ChangeHistory.
      Specified by:
      getChildPositionCode in interface NonTerminalProgramElement
      Parameters:
      child - the exact child to look for.
      Returns:
      the positional code of the given child, or -1.
      See Also:
      • ChangeHistory.detached(recoder.java.ProgramElement, recoder.java.NonTerminalProgramElement, int)

    • accept

      public void accept(SourceVisitor v)
      Description copied from interface: SourceElement
      Receive a visitor, for instance a pretty printer.
      Specified by:
      accept in interface SourceElement
      Parameters:
      v - a source visitor.

    • deepClone

      public MethodBodyStatement deepClone()
      Description copied from interface: SourceElement
      Creates a deep clone of the current source element. For NonTerminalProgramElements, the parent roles are valid, except that the root element is not included anywhere and hence has no set parents, of course. This method also clones Comment s, but does not clone derived information such as scopes.
      Specified by:
      deepClone in interface SourceElement
      Specified by:
      deepClone in interface Statement
